caption: The video features a man performing live, likely at a musical event or concert. He is seated and playing an acoustic guitar while singing into a microphone. The man is dressed in a white shirt with a black vest adorned with intricate blue embroidery and a red and black pendant. His hair is neatly combed back, and he wears glasses. The background consists of wooden blinds, suggesting an indoor setting, possibly a hall or a studio. The audience is partially visible in the foreground, indicating that this is a public performance. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner, which might be the name of the venue or the organizing entity. The man appears focused and engaged in his performance, creating a warm and intimate atmosphere.
